thread.title: Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG)
thread.definitionDraft: Retrieval-Augmented Generation connects an LLM to an external non-parametric knowledge store: at generation time a retriever fetches relevant passages and feeds them as context, grounding the answer in citable sources rather than only the model’s parametric memory.
thread.whyNow: After the 2024–2025 “long context vs RAG” debate, the consensus is that RAG did not die but evolved—on production retrieval loads it is cheaper and lower-latency than stuffing everything into the window, and remains the main way to ground LLMs in private/real-time data without retraining.
thread.useBoundary: Focus on the retrieval engineering chain itself: recall (BM25/dense/hybrid), reranking, chunking, citation grounding and RAG evaluation. Exclude multi-hop autonomous research agents (that is the deep-research thread) and runtime context-window management (context-engineering).

sourceRequirements.companyStrategyContextPolicy: Company strategy sources may be kept only as optional company_strategy_context targets and must not count toward topic readiness.

sources.title: Retrieval-Augmented Generation for Knowledge-Intensive NLP Tasks
sources.whyRelevant: RAG 原论文，提出并命名“检索增强生成”，在开放域 QA 上刷 SOTA。
sources.evidenceQuote: A general-purpose fine-tuning recipe that combines pre-trained parametric memory with non-parametric memory for language generation.
sources.text:
Retrieval-Augmented Generation for Knowledge-Intensive NLP Tasks

RAG 原论文，提出并命名“检索增强生成”，在开放域 QA 上刷 SOTA。

Evidence note: A general-purpose fine-tuning recipe that combines pre-trained parametric memory with non-parametric memory for language generation.

sources.whyRelevant: dense 双编码器召回奠基，比 BM25 top-20 高 9–19%，是 RAG 召回支柱。
sources.text:

sources.title: ColBERT: Efficient and Effective Passage Search via Contextualized Late Interaction over BERT
sources.whyRelevant: late interaction (MaxSim) 奠基，兼顾 BERT 表达力与可预计算，快两个数量级。
sources.text:

late interaction (MaxSim) 奠基，兼顾 BERT 表达力与可预计算，快两个数量级。

sources.text:

edges.evidenceNote: DPR 的 dense 双编码器正是 RAG 原论文采用的神经检索器，召回支撑生成。
ColBERT 的 late interaction 细粒度打分是商用 rerank 重排环节的学术先驱。
Anthropic Contextual Retrieval 实测里 rerank 环节直接用 Cohere reranker。
综述把原论文的 Naive RAG 作为起点，归纳到 Advanced / Modular RAG 演进谱系。
原论文一作本人在访谈里讲 RAG 命名由来与评估挑战。
RAGAS 的 context relevance / faithfulness 指标正是 Anthropic 那类 chunking / 检索改进所需的量化评估。
学术实证与行业博客就“长上下文能否取代 RAG”形成对话，结论都是 RAG 进化非消亡。
DSPy 论文方法论由同名开源仓库落地。

review.notes: Deep-core 2026-06-21: 17 sources / 8 edges, all arXiv ids verified online (2005.11401=Lewis RAG, 2004.04906=DPR, 2004.12832=ColBERT, 2309.15217=RAGAS, 2312.10997=survey, 2310.03714=DSPy). 2 signal sources (long-ctx-vs-rag 2501.01880, LightOn) kept at source_pack_review pending exact-claim recheck. Roles all >=2.
